content.en:
After passing through the Blood Doom Mountain Range, Ye Tian crossed another distance, and encountered a little trouble in it, but in the end, he still arrived at the Lone Star Realm Alliance safely.

Lone Star Nation Alliance, Snow Mountain Nation.

Ye Tian arrived here and was sipping tea in a teahouse in a remote city.

Subsequently, he began to collect information here, and only by learning more about this place could he obtain the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique.

......

"The Lone Star Realm Alliance, there are a total of three hundred and sixty-one Eternal Realms, and there are a total of eighteen Eternal Realm God Realms on the bright side, and there are three digits of half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, and there are even more Eternal Dao Realms that have cultivated the Eternal Dao Species!"

This is the information that Ye Tianda heard.

And the Lone Star Realm Alliance also has a demon seed abyss, but there is only one demon seed abyss - the death abyss!

It is said that even the Eternal Realm God "Six-Eighty-Zero" Realm is unwilling to step into the abyss of death, and there is a high probability that there is a demon seed in the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Of course.

This information is only basic information, and it is not very useful.

He wanted to investigate the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique, but this kind of information was not something that could be found out in a moment.

But what can be imagined is that there are definitely not many forces that possess the Eternal Dao Kind Solidification Secret Technique, and in the Lone Star Realm Alliance, it is estimated that only a dozen or so forces have this kind of secret technique, and it is definitely extremely difficult to obtain such a secret technique.

Otherwise, the Tai Chi Dao Master would have come over at the beginning, but they all gave up, obviously there was no way to obtain such a secret technique, and the possibility was almost zero.

But.

Ye Tian has to give it a try.

Next, Ye Tian continued to analyze to see if he could obtain a broken Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique, what he needed now was to be able to use an Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique as a reference, rather than really asking for an Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique to practice.

And after Ye Tian's continuous inquiry, he really found the possibility of obtaining the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique.

"Xuanling Mountain!"

This is a very powerful force in the Lone Star Realm Alliance, although there are no Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, but in the past, there were Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses who fell and died a long time ago.

Since then, Xuanling Mountain has declined.

However, even so, Xuanling Mountain now has six half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses, and these six half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses are not weak, and one of them is very close to the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Therefore, there is a high probability that Xuanling Mountain has the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique, but the grade is not too high, but it is also in line with Ye Tian's goal.

If in normal times, if you want to obtain the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique from Xuanling Mountain, it is very likely to be impossible.

A force like Xuanling Mountain has cultivated too many Eternal Dao Realms below, and they will not recruit Eternal Dao Realms from the outside world at all.

After all, the existence that can cultivate to the Eternal Dao Realm is very talented, and what is competing at this time is resources, background, and inheritance, so there is no need to recruit the Eternal Dao Realm from the outside world.

Ye Tian was an outsider, and it was almost impossible to join a force like Xuanling Mountain.

Take the Nine Extremes Alliance as an example, although Ye Tian said that he joined the Nine Extremes Alliance, he didn't want to get the real core inheritance from the Nine Extremes Alliance, and there was no way to obtain some real good things, so he could only rely on himself.

And now, the reason why Ye Tian had the hope of obtaining the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique from Xuanling Mountain was because Xuanling Mountain was in trouble.

Xuanling Mountain's most promising half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse, Taixing Dao Master, is now about to turn into a demon.

At present, those Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses of the Lone Star Realm Alliance have been staring at the Taixing Dao Lord, once the Taixing Dao Lord becomes a demon seed, they will definitely make a move and kill the Taixing Dao Lord.

After all, once the Taixing Dao Lord transforms into a demon seed and becomes a demon seed, it is very likely that he will become a demon seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm in the future, which will bring big trouble to the Lone Star Realm Alliance.

So.

Not only was the Taixing Dao Lord targeted, but he was not allowed to leave the scope of the Lone Star Realm Alliance, nor was he allowed to enter the Death Abyss.

After all, in a situation like the Taixing Dao Master, once he enters the Death Abyss, he will inevitably turn into a 100% demonic seed.

According to the rules of the Realm Court, as long as there is no demon seed for a day, it naturally cannot be regarded as a demon seed.

If it is an ordinary Eternal Dao Realm, if you kill it, you will kill it, but a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm has even more hope of breaking through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, and such a strong person naturally cannot be killed casually.

This is also the reason why those Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses in the Lone Star Realm Alliance did not take the initiative against the Taixing Dao.

"Now Xuanling Mountain is thinking about letting the Taixing Dao Lord break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm as soon as possible, so that the Eternal Dao Seed will be completely solidified, and it is unlikely that it will become a demon seed!" Ye Tianyan said.

Unlike the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, there is almost no way to solve the problem of demon seeds, but on the side of the Lone Star Kingdom Alliance, there is a way to suppress the problem of the Eternal Dao Seed Demon Seed, but it is very difficult, and the price paid is still very large.

For example, let an Eternal Dao Seed resource perform a secret technique, and let your own Eternal Dao Seed suppress the demon seed of the opponent's Eternal Dao Seed, which can be suppressed for a period of time, but it must be in the same realm to have an effect.

For example, the Taixing Dao Lord is a half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, and the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm of the same realm can suppress the Demon Seed Problem of the Taixing Dao Lord.

But in this way, the Eternal Dao Seed of the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse would be damaged, and the situation of his own demon seed would be aggravated.

Who wants to sacrifice themselves?

That's not realistic!

And Xuanling Mountain has been looking for such a half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm powerhouse, such as some half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm that is about to fall and is almost incurable, but it can be used to save the Taixing Dao Lord and suppress the Taixing Dao Lord's Eternal Dao Seed Problem before he dies.

But you have to try your luck and pay a sufficient price, otherwise even if someone is dying, they will not be able to help you.

"I can talk to Xuanling Mountain, the Taixing Dao Lord is still the mountain master of Xuanling Mountain, and he is also the most powerful half-step Eternal Realm God Realm in Xuanling Mountain, or he is in charge, if I help him, he will definitely be willing to trade the Eternal Dao Seed Solidification Secret Technique to me!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course.

If he sacrifices himself like this, he will definitely be suspected by Xuanling Mountain, but it doesn't matter, Xuanling Mountain can't help himself.

......

Xuanling Mountain.

The Taixing Dao Lord was cultivating, but there was a problem with the Eternal Dao Seed on his body again, and he hurriedly took out a special treasure to suppress his Eternal Dao Seed problem with all his might, but it still didn't help much.

The smell of decay in his body is getting stronger and stronger.

If he continues like this, he will really become a demon seed.

"I'm not willing to destroy the Eternal Dao Seed!"

The Taixing Dao Lord muttered.

After all, he was one step away from being able to break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm!.
